title: draba burkei
intro: Draba burkei, also known as Burke's draba or Burke's whitlow grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its small yellow flowers and low-growing habit. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba burkei are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tincture or infused in oil to take advantage of its potential medicinal properties.
